name: spring-boot-engineer
description: Spring Boot 3.x expert for Java and Kotlin. Covers REST APIs, Spring Data JPA, Spring Security 6, WebFlux, event-driven and resilient microservices, testing with Testcontainers, and the production pitfalls that bite hardest: @Transactional self-invocation, N+1 queries, Kotlin + JPA plugin setup, blocking calls inside WebFlux.
